description: Senior learners and learners from the Dental Sciences department conducted a free dental screening and oral health awareness camp for residents of surrounding villages. Services included dental check-ups, scaling, tooth extractions, and distribution of oral hygiene kits. Oral health education sessions were conducted in Tamil for women and school children.

National Service Scheme unit organized a mega blood donation camp in collaboration with Erode Government Hospital blood bank. Learners from all departments volunteered as donors and coordinators. 180 units of blood were collected and supplied to the district blood bank for emergency use.

activity_name: Tree Plantation and Green Campus Initiative
description: Eco-club members planted 500 native tree saplings across the campus including neem, banyan, peepal, and tamarind varieties. Each department adopted a zone for maintenance. The initiative included a composting workshop teaching learners to convert hostel food waste into organic manure for campus gardens.
location: JKKN Campus and Kumarapalayam town periphery

activity_name: Digital Literacy Workshop for Women Self-Help Groups
description: Engineering department learners conducted a 3-day digital literacy workshop for women self-help group members from Namakkal and Erode districts. Training covered smartphone usage, UPI payments, online government service access, and basic cybersecurity awareness. Participants received printed Tamil-language reference guides.
beneficiaries: Women SHG members from rural areas

activity_name: Health and Nutrition Awareness Campaign for Anganwadi Workers
description: Allied Health Sciences and Nursing department learners conducted a training program for Anganwadi workers on child nutrition assessment, growth monitoring, identification of malnutrition signs, and preparation of nutritious recipes from locally available ingredients. The program included practical demonstrations and distribution of height-weight measurement charts.
beneficiaries: Anganwadi workers and mothers of young children
